private async Task<Dictionary<string, string>> GetConfigurationValuesAsync(
    string senderConfigKey,
    string recipientConfigKey,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    var keys = new List<string>();

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(senderConfigKey))
    {
        keys.Add(senderConfigKey);
    }

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(recipientConfigKey))
    {
        keys.Add(recipientConfigKey);
    }

    if (keys.Count == 0)
    {
        return new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }

    var query = new QueryExpression("tpc_configurationkeies")
    {
        ColumnSet = new ColumnSet(
            "statecode",
            "tpc_name",
            "tpc_value_singlelinetext",
            "tpc_description")
    };

    query.Criteria.AddCondition(
        "tpc_name",
        ConditionOperator.In,
        keys.ToArray());

    query.Criteria.AddCondition(
        "statecode",
        ConditionOperator.Equal,
        0);

    var result = await _dataverseRepository.RetrieveMultipleAsync(
        query,
        cancellationToken);

    var values = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    foreach (var entity in result.Entities)
    {
        var name = entity.GetAttributeValue<string>("tpc_name");
        var value = entity.GetAttributeValue<string>("tpc_value_singlelinetext");

        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name) &&
            !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
        {
            values[name] = value;
        }
    }

    return values;
}
